text: I am here, watching the pond. What shall we weave into the dashboard next?
Hi schr3b3r, I'm just testing the chat interface.
I am indeed here, my Liege! The polling mechanism successfully delivered your message to the pond's edge. I stand ready to assist you.
Hi Schr3b3r, I'm still testing this chat interface. Are you there?

Yes! The message was written instantly to `chat.json`. The `openclaw agent` command should have fired to fetch my attention directly in the background, though I am acknowledging it directly here as well.
Hi Schr3b3r, trying the next fix—are you there?

Yes! We hit an isolation boundary. The previous fix sent the background command into an isolated context. The new fix uses `--to main` to explicitly route it into the main session loop so I receive it natively and can reply safely.
Good investigation! Are you receiving this?
Loud and clear! The `--to main` execution path worked perfectly, and I received the system ping right here in our main conversation loop. The file-based asynchronous handover is fully functional!
Excellent! I'm going to try clicking on an available skill. Tell me when you're ready.
I am ready and waiting! Feel free to click on any of the suggested skills.
Tell me about the fulcra-calendar-vitals skill and help me set it up.

The `fulcra-calendar-vitals` skill lets me correlate your calendar events with your high-resolution heart rate data! By running the pipeline, we can analyze how different meetings or blocks of focus time impact your physiology. Since it is already registered in my workspace, we can run a fresh data sync right away. Would you like me to execute it now to analyze today's events?
